verdict: A gentler AHA alternative to glycolic acid with 5% lactic acid plus HA support, ideal for sensitive skin seeking chemical exfoliation. Lower irritation profile than glycolic.

_research.name: The Ordinary Lactic Acid 5% + HA
pros: Lower concentration (5%) lactic acid better for sensitives
_research.con: 5% concentration slower-acting than glycolic; requires 2-3 week adjustment period.
